====Pokémon==== This listing is of Marnie's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in {{aniseries|PTS}}: {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Marnie |pkmn=Morpeko |type1=Electric |type2=Dark |img=Marnie Morpeko.png |epnum=JN099 |epname=Battling Turned Up to Eleven! |vajp=Daiki Yamashita |vaen= |desc={{p|Morpeko}} is Marnie's first known Pokémon and is usually seen [[Walking Pokémon|outside of its Poké Ball]]. It was seen watching the battle between its Trainer and Ash. None of Morpeko's moves are known and its Ability is {{a|Hunger Switch}}.https://twitter.com/anipoke_PR/status/1497813751319625728}} {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Marnie |pkmn=Grimmsnarl |giga=yes |type1=Dark |type2=Fairy |img=Marnie Grimmsnarl.png |cap=Marnie's Grimmsnarl |img2=Marnie Grimmsnarl Gigantamax.png |cap2=Marnie's Gigantamax Grimmsnarl |gender=male |epnum=JN099 |epname=Battling Turned Up to Eleven! |vajp=Shogo Sakata |vaen=Jason Griffith |desc={{p|Grimmsnarl}} is Marnie's second known Pokémon. He is capable of [[Gigantamax]]ing and was used during Marnie's battle against {{Ash}}, where he faced {{AP|Gengar}} and lost. He is housed in a [[Dusk Ball]]. Grimmsnarl's known moves are {{m|Spirit Break}}, {{m|False Surrender}}, {{m|Darkest Lariat}}, and {{m|Stomping Tantrum}}.
As a Gigantamax Grimmsnarl, he can use {{m|G-Max Snooze}}, {{m|Max Quake}}, and {{m|Max Starfall}}.}}
